description_long: This object is a roughly rectangular block of stone with a high-relief carving of a human face and upper torso on one side. The face is detailed, featuring prominent hair, eyebrows, eyes, nose, mustache, and lips, with the head slightly raised from the stone surface. The rest of the block is irregular and uncarved, with rough, natural stone textures and some visible chisel marks. The stone appears to have a glossy, polished finish on the carved face, while the sides and back are more matte and uneven. The block is solid and heavy, with no visible openings or recesses. Its overall appearance suggests it could serve as a commemorative or decorative element in an urban environment, such as a park or plaza.
description: A rectangular stone block with a detailed, glossy-carved human face in high relief on one side, and rough, natural stone textures on the other surfaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the detailed, high-relief carving of a human face and upper torso, with a glossy finish and clear facial features.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the rough, uncarved stone surface with natural texture and no visible features.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the irregular, concave back of the stone, showing rough, unfinished surfaces and no carvings.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the block's thickness and the transition from the carved face to the rough, natural stone.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on a paved or landscaped area
attribute_pattern: The front face features a high-relief carved portrait, while the rest of the stone has irregular, natural stone textures with some chisel marks.
attribute_weathering: The carved face is smooth and polished, suggesting recent work or maintenance, while the sides and back are rough and show minor surface irregularities.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: The object is likely to contrast with man-made structures due to its natural stone texture, but the polished face may draw attention and serve as a focal point in its setting.
